Metadata.title: AI Product Video Generator | Seedance 2.0 for Ecommerce Ads
Metadata.description: Create ecommerce video ads for Shopify, Amazon, and Etsy in minutes with Seedance 2.0.

Hero.title: Generate product ads in minutes.
Hero.description: Upload your product image, choose a format, and render launch-ready video creative without a production team.
Hero.creditsHint: $1 one-time trial pack includes 1 video (once per account).
Hero.noModels: No enabled models are available for the current AI provider configuration.

Notifications.generationWillNotify: Generation may take a while. We'll notify you when it's ready.
Notifications.notificationDescription: Get notified when your video generation is complete.
Notifications.videoReadyBody:
Prompt: {prompt}
Your generation has finished. Tap to view.
Notifications.videoReadyBodyShort: Your generation has finished. Tap to view.

ToolPage.emptySubtitle: Start a generation on the left to see it here.
ToolPage.promptExample1: A cinematic close‑up of rain on neon streets, slow motion.
ToolPage.promptExample2: A cozy café at golden hour, gentle camera pan.
ToolPage.promptExample3: A futuristic skyline with soft fog and glowing lights.
ToolPage.tipsLine1: Be specific about subject, lighting, and motion.
ToolPage.tipsLine3: Add mood words: cinematic, dreamy, minimal.
ToolPage.generatingHint: This video is being generated. You can start another task meanwhile.

Showcase.title: See sample outputs before you launch
Showcase.description: Reference styles that sellers use for feeds, listings, and product demos.
Showcase.ctaText: Explore more examples and adapt them to your product.

ugc.title: Creator-style social ad
ugc.description: Vertical hook-first creative for paid and organic social channels.

demo.title: Feature-led walkthrough
demo.description: Show setup, use case, and outcomes in a clean narrative.

listing.title: Marketplace-ready product clip
listing.description: Short format tailored for PDP and listing environments.

Features.title: A focused workflow, not a bloated editor
Features.description: Three capabilities cover most ecommerce ad production from idea to export.

quality.title: Consistent motion quality
quality.description: Seedance is tuned for product-forward scenes and stable movement.

workflow.title: Prompt + image workflow
workflow.description: Start from text, product photos, or references in one generator.

delivery.title: Channel-ready exports
delivery.description: Ship outputs for ads, feeds, and product listings without extra tools.

HowItWorks.title: From product photo to ad in three steps
HowItWorks.description: Keep your team in one flow: brief, generate, publish.

prompt.title: Write the brief
prompt.description: Describe your offer, target customer, and visual direction.

upload.title: Add product assets
upload.description: Upload your product photos or references and choose a format.

generate.title: Generate and review
generate.description: Create variations, compare results, and publish the best cut.

CTA.title: Build your next product ad with Seedance
CTA.description: Open the generator, pick a model, and publish your first creative today.

benefits.free: $1 one-time trial pack (1 video, once per account)

panel.title: What you can do next
panel.headline: Create, review, and iterate in one place.
panel.description: Use the homepage generator for first drafts, then manage outputs and retries in your workspace.
panel.note: Tip: Save prompt variations and compare results in My Creations.

FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.subtitle: Key details about generation, usage rights, and credits.

general.question: Who is Seedance for?
general.answer: Seedance is for ecommerce sellers, brand teams, and agencies that need product-focused video ads quickly.

commercial.question: Can I use generated videos for commercial campaigns?
commercial.answer: Yes. Generated outputs can be used in commercial channels based on your active plan terms.

aiModels.question: Which models are available?
aiModels.answer: Model availability depends on your current provider configuration and may update over time.

credits.question: How do credits work?
credits.answer: Each generation consumes credits based on model and settings. Your monthly plan includes a credit allowance.

refund.question: Do monthly credits roll over automatically?
refund.answer: Monthly credits are allocated per billing cycle. Check plan terms for rollover or upgrade options.

support.question: Where can I get support?
support.answer: Contact support@videofly.app for billing, generation, or workflow questions.

Footer.description: Seedance helps ecommerce teams generate product videos with fast, repeatable workflows.

PricingFaq.faq_detail: Find answers to common questions about our pricing

Sidebar.title: Navigation
Sidebar.upgradeSubtitle: Unlock faster generation and more credits

UpgradeModal.insufficient_credits_description: You need at least {credits} credits to generate this video. Purchase a credit pack or upgrade to continue.
UpgradeModal.expired_description: Your credits have expired. Purchase a new pack or subscribe to continue creating.

resetPassword.subject: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.title: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.body: We received a request to reset your password for your Seedance account.
resetPassword.instruction: Click the button below to reset your password:
resetPassword.validity: This link will expire in 30 minutes and can only be used once.
resetPassword.security: For security reasons, this link expires after 30 minutes.
resetPassword.ignore: If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.
resetPassword.footer: If you didn't request this, please ignore this email.

Testimonials.title: What teams say after shipping with Seedance

seller.name: Maya L.
seller.quote: We can test new ad angles much faster because the first draft is ready in minutes.

brand.name: Connor T.
brand.quote: The workflow is simple enough for our catalog team and still gives us usable ad cuts.

team.name: Nina P.
team.quote: Seedance helps us turn one product brief into multiple variations for testing.

PricingLanding.title: Start with a $1 trial, then scale
PricingLanding.description: No free tier. Choose the plan that matches your monthly volume.
PricingLanding.note: Trial includes 1 video and is limited to one purchase per account.
